summary: 0.6.27 is the core-player file-I/O and refresh-hygiene slice after 0.6.26 fixed the video sync issue but the operator still reported worsening hourglass freezes even when paused on images.
operatorSignals: A separate worsening lag remained, with hourglass freezes every few seconds until the player became unusable.
The lag still appeared even when movies were paused and only images were loaded.
The operator asked for absolute confidence that the core player was not drifting into stray file reads or writes outside media and playlist handling.
actionsTaken: Verified official VaM's built-in ImageControl seam in Assembly-CSharp.dll and kept the 0.6.26 video-time-owned sync model intact.
Checked the current player runtime for stray file-I/O and found the SessionBridgeJsonl event outbox append path was still present in the normal scene-runtime code.
Disabled runtime event outbox appends for non-test core-player builds.
Reduced the status refresh cadence and changed player readback and slider writes to update only on meaningful value changes.
nonGoals: No surface, binding, TV, or Volodeck work.
No playlist or autoplay policy changes.
